title: Law on Environmental Protection and Natural Resource Management_961242
title_en: Law on Environmental Protection and Natural Resource Management_961242
short_name: Law on Environmental Protection and Natural Resource Mana...

provisions.title: The purposes of this law are:
provisions.content:
z to protect [and] promote environmental quality and public health through the prevention,
reduction, and control of pollution

z to assess the environmental impact of all proposed projects prior to the issuance of a
decision by the Royal Government

z to ensure the rational and sustainable conservation, development, management, and use of
the natural resources of the kingdom of Cambodia

z to encourage and enable the pubic to participate in environmental protection and natural
resource management

z to suppress any acts that cause harm to the environment.

provisions.chapter: Chapter II: NATIONAL AND REGIONAL ENVIRONMENTAL PLANS
provisions.title: A National Environmental Plan [and] Regional Environmental Plans shall be decided by the
provisions.content:
Royal Government following a proposal of the Ministry of Environment in collaboration with
concerned ministries.

provisions.chapter: Chapter II: NATIONAL AND REGIONAL ENVIRONMENTAL PLANS
provisions.title: The National Environmental Plan is a plan for environmental protection and sustainable natural
provisions.content:
resource management for implementation throughout the Kingdom of Cambodia.

The National Environmental Plan shall:

z identify important environmental issues and important natural resource management
issues the are related to socio-economic development

z set forth measures for ensuring environmental management.

provisions.chapter: Chapter II: NATIONAL AND REGIONAL ENVIRONMENTAL PLANS
provisions.title: Regional Environmental Plans shall be consistent with the National Environmental Plan Regional
provisions.content:
Environmental Pans shall:
z identify important environmental issues and important natural resource management
issues that are related to socio-economic development of respective regions

z set forth measures for ensuring environmental management in the said region.

provisions.title: An environmental impact assessment shall be done on every project and activity, private or
provisions.content:
public, and shall be reviewed and evaluated by the Ministry of Environment before being
submitted to the Royal Government for decision:

This assessment shall also be done for existing and in-process activities that have not yet been
assessed for environmental impact.

The procedures of the environmental impact assessment process shall be determined by Sub-
decree following a proposal of the Ministry of Environment.

The nature and size of the proposed projects and activities and existing and in-process activities,
both private and public, that shall be subject to that environmental impact assessment shall be
determined by Sub-decree following a proposal of the Ministry of Environment.

provisions.title: All Investment Project Applications and all projects proposed by the State shall have an initial
provisions.content:
Environmental Impact Assessment or an Environmental Impact Assessment as specified in article
6 of this law. The Ministry of Environment shall review and provide recommendations on the
initial Environment Impact Assessment or the Environmental Impact Assessment to the
competent organization within the period determined in the Law on Investment of the Kingdom
of Cambodia.

provisions.title: The natural resources of the Kingdom of Cambodia, which include land, water, airspace, air,
provisions.content:
geology, ecological systems, mines, energy, petroleum and gas, rocks and sand, precious stones,
forests and forest products, wildlife, fish, (land) aquatic resources, shall be conserved developed,
and managed (and) used in a rational and sustainable manner.

Natural resource protected areas, which include national parks, wildlife sanctuaries protected
landscape areas, (and) multiple use areas, shall be determined by Royal Decree.

provisions.title: The Ministry of Environment, in collaboration with concerned ministries, shall conduct research,
provisions.content:
assess the environmental impacts on natural resources, and provide the concerned ministries with
recommendations to ensure that the natural resources as specified in article 8 are conserved,
developed, and managed (and) used in a rational and sustainable manner.

provisions.title: Before issuing any decisions or undertaking activities related to the conservation, development, or
provisions.content:
management (or) use of natural resources, the concerned ministries shall Consult with the
Ministry of Environment on the sustainability of natural resources.

provisions.title: The Ministry of Environment shall immediately inform concerned ministries whenever the
provisions.content:
Ministry of Environment finds that natural resources are not being conserved, developed, or
managed (or) used in a rational and sustainable manner.
-2-

provisions.title: The Ministry of Environment shall collaborate with concerned ministries to develop an inventory
provisions.content:
that indicates:

z The sources, types, and quantities of pollutants and wastes being imported. Generated,
transported, recycled, treated, stored, disposed, or released into the airspace, water, land,
or on land.

z The sources, types, and quantities of toxic substances and hazardous substances being
imported, manufactured, transported, stored, used, generated, treated, recycled, disposed,
or released into the airspace, water, or into land or no land.

z The sources, types, and extend of noise and vibration disturbances.

provisions.title: The prevention, reduction, and control of airspace, water (and) land pollution, noise and vibration
provisions.content:
disturbances, as well as waste, toxic substances, and hazardous substances, shall be determined by
Sub-decree following a proposal of the Ministry of Environment.

provisions.chapter: Chapter VI: MONITORING, RECORD-KEEPING AND INSPECTIONS
provisions.title: The Ministry of Environment shall collaborate with concerned ministries to require the owners or
provisions.content:
responsible persons of factories, pollution sources, industrial sites, or sites of natural resource
development activity:
z to install or use monitoring equipment

z to provide sample

z to prepare or maintain and submit [for] review records and reports.

provisions.chapter: Chapter VI: MONITORING, RECORD-KEEPING AND INSPECTIONS
provisions.title: In order to carry out its responsibilities and in its responsibilities on Natural Protected Areas, the
provisions.content:
Ministry of Environment, in collaboration with concerned ministries, may enter [and] conduct an
inspection in an area, premises, building, on or in a means of transportation or any place ,etc., in
cases when the Ministry of Environment finds that the source is causing harm to environmental
quality,

The Ministry of Environment inspector and official of the concerned ministry that is collaborating
shall present their identity cards and mission authorization letters before conducting the
inspection.

During the inspection, whenever they find that there has been a criminal violation the inspectors
shall immediately report to the competent institution so that action can be taken under the law.

Procedures for the performance of inspections shall be determined by Sub-decree following a
proposal of the Ministry of Environment.

provisions.chapter: Chapter VII: PUBLIC PARTICIPATION AND ACCESS INFORMATION
provisions.title: The Ministry of Environment. following a request from the public, shall provide information on
provisions.content:
its activities, and shall encourage public participation in environmental protection and natural
resource management.

provisions.chapter: Chapter VII: PUBLIC PARTICIPATION AND ACCESS INFORMATION
provisions.title: The procedures for public participation and access to information on environmental protection
provisions.content:
and natural resource management shall be determined by Sub-decree following a proposal of the
Ministry of Environment.

provisions.chapter: Chapter VII: PUBLIC PARTICIPATION AND ACCESS INFORMATION
provisions.title: Information related to environmental protection or natural resource management shall be mutually
provisions.content: disseminated between the ministry of Environment and different ministries

provisions.title: A special Treasury account, the Environment Endowment Fund shall be created , and
provisions.content:
administered by the Ministry of Environment for environmental protection and natural resource
conservation in the Kingdom of Cambodia in accordance with the Finance Law The Environment
Endowments Fund, which comes from contributions from the Royal Government grants from
international organizations, donations from charitable individuals. donations from non-
governmental organizations, and other lawful sums, shall be included in the National Budget in
order to provide the above special account.

provisions.title: For any person who commits a violation of the Ministry of Environment’s requirements as
provisions.content:
specified in article 14 of this law, the Ministry of Environment shall issue a written order
requiring:

z correction of the violating activities immediately or within a specified time period; or

z cessation of his/her/its activities until the violation has been corrected: or
z clean-up of the pollution immediately.

provisions.title: Any person who does not permit or refuses to allow an inspector to enter [and ] conduct and
provisions.content:
examination or inspection on the premises as stated in premises as stated in paragraph I. article 15
of this law shall be fined administratively from five hundred thousand Riel (500,000 Riel) to one
million Riel (1,000,00 Riel).

In case of a repeat offense shall be fined from one million Riel (1,000,000 Riel) to five million
Riel (5,000,000 Riel) or imprisoned from 1month to 3 months, or both.

Any person who commits a violation of article 20 of this law shall be fined administratively from
one million Riel (1,000,000 Riel). In case of a repeat offense shall be fined from twenty one
million Riel (21,000,000 Riel) to thirty million Riel (30,000.000 Riel) or imprisoned from 1
month to 1 year, or both.

provisions.title: If the violation causes danger to human bodies or lives. to private property, to public property, to
provisions.content:
the environment. [or ] to natural resources, shall be fined from ten million Riel (10 million Riel )
to fifty million Riel (50 million Riel) or imprisoned from 1year to 5 years, or both.
-4-

A person who commits a violation shall also be responsible for repairing damage and for
compensation.

provisions.title: In case of a violation that causes of the offense connected with any other offenses above in order
provisions.content: to pronounce the punishment.

provisions.title: Any environmental inspection official or agent who is negligent, fails to pay attention to, or fails
provisions.content:
to comply with the Ministry’s regulation, or conspires with a violator or facilitates the
commission of a violation, shall be subject to administrative sanctions or face prosecution before
the court.

provisions.title: The Ministry of Environment shall apply the provisions of article 20above for any person who
provisions.content:
commits a violation of a Sub-decree and other regulations related to the provisions of this law.

In case of recalcitrance, shall apply the provisions stated in article 21 of this law.

provisions.title: After this law takes effect and until 31 December 2001, the Royal Government may extend, for
provisions.content:
activities presently in process, the period to comply with a Sub-decree specified in article 13 of
this law following a proposal of the Ministry of Environment.

In deciding on this extension, [the Royal Government] shall:

o take into account the nature and extent of the danger to human health, to the
environment, and to natural resources that may result from this extension.
o review the possibility, means, technicality, and finance of this existing activity.

provisions.title: Any provisions that are contrary to this law shall be considered null.
provisions.content:
Done in Penh. 24 December 1996

Norodom Sihanouk

Submitted to the First and Second Submitted for the King’s signature
Prime Ministers
First Prime Minister Second Prime Minister
Minister of Environment Norodom Ranariddh Hun Sen
Mok Mareth
